further_reading.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides the foundational retrieval pattern that underpins the module's distinction between adding knowledge and extending capability.

further_reading.title: Building Effective Agents
further_reading.why_relevant: Offers practical guidance on when to use tools, workflows, and human approvals instead of adding broad autonomy too early.

further_reading.title: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications
further_reading.why_relevant: Gives a concrete risk framework for tool boundaries, external access, and action-taking systems.

notes: Module is primarily pedagogical and conceptual. It does not make specific historical, statistical, vendor-version, pricing, incident, or standards-bound claims that require inline citation under the seed rules.
